summary: Frontend testing completed for new accommodation types (Dome Stay and A-Frame Cabin). All 7 stay cards display correctly with proper images, icons, and descriptions. Booking form dropdown includes all 7 options. Card clicks scroll to booking form. Grid layout uses xl:grid-cols-4 for 4-column display on large screens.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all 7 stay cards
New icons (CircleDot for Dome Stay, Triangle for A-Frame Cabin) imported correctly from lucide-react
STAY_TYPES array in EnquiryForm.jsx matches STAYS array in Stays.jsx
Grid layout updated to xl:grid-cols-4 to accommodate 7 cards nicely
seed_data_creation: N/A - Static landing page with no database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 stay types tested and working: Pool Property, Budget Property, Premium Property, Tents, Dormitory, Dome Stay, A-Frame Cabin. All cards clickable and scroll to booking form. Dropdown has all 7 options. Images load correctly for all cards.

stays_section_7_cards.details: All 7 property type cards visible: Pool Property, Budget Property, Premium Property, Tents, Dormitory, Dome Stay, A-Frame Cabin

dome_stay_card.details: Dome Stay card has correct image, CircleDot icon, and description ('A futuristic escape wrapped in nature...')

a_frame_cabin_card.details: A-Frame Cabin card has correct image, Triangle icon, and description ('Cozy alpine-style cabins nestled in the forest...')

stay_cards_clickable.details: All 7 stay cards are clickable and scroll to booking form section

booking_dropdown_7_options.details: Stay Type dropdown includes all 7 options: Pool Property, Budget Property, Premium Property, Tents, Dormitory, Dome Stay, A-Frame Cabin

grid_layout.details: Grid uses xl:grid-cols-4 for 4-column layout on large screens, responsive down to 1 column on mobile

all_images_loaded.details: All 7 card images load correctly from Unsplash
